text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew! Well done everyone! That was some race!

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
Wait... isn't that Manhattan Cafe over there?
Hey, good job today...

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text: Huh, didn't she hear me? Um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe turns away from the other runner
and gazes into the distance.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...My friend won. She took off by herself, shot
past the finish line... and kept going... into the
distance...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She seemed so happy, getting to run in a vast
space like this. But at the same time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She ran so, so fast... it was like she was set free
from something. The distance between us was
greater than I'd ever seen...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I want to catch up to her, but... how can I do
that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from what Manhattan Cafe's told me, her
Friend is significantly faster than her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So a quick-fix plan won't get us anywhere.
Meaning...
choice_data_list:
Let's build your strength little by little. We can
decide on your goal race later.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Little by little... That's going to take a while...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Are you okay with this approach?
Are you okay with this approach?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I am. If you say rushing is out of the question,
then that's that...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Besides, this might be just what I need... Since my
body isn't very strong...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She nods, moves to my side, then vows to chase
after our goal together.

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't you think those two are kinda weird?
Staring off into the distance like that.

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text:
I guess they're both weirdos... Let's keep our
distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll try to make sense of the things that only
Manhattan Cafe can understand as we continue
racking up achievements together.
